name: Raspado com Degradê (Buzz Cut Fade)
prompt: high skin fade buzz cut: the top of the head features short uniform stubble using a #3 clipper guard, while the sides and back are shaved into a sharp high skin fade, smooth gradient transitioning from bare skin at the bottom up to the short hair on top, crisp sharp hairline, high visual contrast between the bald sides and the stubble on top

name: Degradê Baixo (Low Fade)
prompt: low skin fade: the fade starts only at the very bottom — just at the neckline and below the ears — smooth gradient from bare skin rising to short hair, the fade zone occupies only the bottom 3cm, hair on top remains full with at least 3cm of volume, crisp blending line clearly visible low on the sides

name: Degradê Médio (Mid Fade)
prompt: mid skin fade: fade begins exactly at temple and mid-ear height, smooth gradient from bare skin at the bottom transitioning upward, the blending line is visible at temple level, sides below the temple are shaved, hair on top remains full at least 3-4cm with texture and volume

name: Degradê Alto (High Fade)
prompt: high skin fade haircut: the hair on top of the head remains completely untouched, full and thick with its original volume and texture, while ONLY the sides and back are shaved into a sharp high skin fade, the bald fade goes very high up to the temple level, crisp blending line, dramatic contrast between the intact top hair and the bare skin sides

name: Cacho Curto com Degradê
prompt: short curly hair on top with defined natural curl pattern, low drop fade on sides, clean perimeter line-up around the ears, completely clean-shaven face, absolutely no beard, no mustache, smooth bare skin on face

name: Crespo Curto
prompt: very short coily afro hair on top, high and tight military cut, tapered sides blending cleanly into the top, crisp sharp hairline, tight visible coil texture on top

name: Moicano Disfarçado (Burst Fade)
prompt: burst fade mohawk: a CLEARLY VISIBLE narrow strip of longer hair running from the forehead down to the nape forming a distinct mohawk ridge on top, the burst fade creates a circular arc around each ear fading to skin level, sides are almost fully shaved leaving ONLY the central mohawk strip raised and prominent, medium length textured hair on the mohawk strip

name: Coque Samurai
prompt: samurai top knot: long hair pulled up and tied into a high bun on top of the head — the bun must be clearly visible and prominent, undercut sides tightly faded to skin level, clean shaved nape and sides contrasting with the bun on top

name: Barba Cheia
prompt: ADD a thick full beard to this person: dense realistic facial hair covering the cheeks, jawline, chin and upper lip, well-groomed connecting mustache to full jaw coverage, natural neckline beard trim, highly detailed realistic beard hair texture

name: Bigode
prompt: ADD a realistic classic mustache ONLY to this person: clean and sharp lines defining a neat mustache on the upper lip, highly detailed individual hair strands with natural texture, the edges blend organically into the skin, cheeks, chin and jawline must be completely clean-shaven with smooth bare skin, no artificial blocks of hair

name: Cavanhaque
prompt: ADD a goatee to this person: facial hair ONLY on the chin and connected mustache on the upper lip forming a circle of hair around the mouth, cheeks completely clean-shaven with zero hair, sharp defined edges on the goatee

name: Old Money Curto
prompt: short classic gentleman haircut: distinct visible side-part, 3 to 4 cm hair length on top swept neatly to the side with visible volume, tightly scissor-cut sides and back (NO bald fade, NO skin fade, scalp must be fully covered by hair), soft natural blending around the ears, textured but controlled hair strands

name: Old Money Médio
prompt: medium length flow haircut: thick dense hair covering the top of the ears slightly, 6 to 8 cm hair length all over the head, pushed completely backwards with natural flowing waves, high volume on top and sides, NO shaved parts, full thick sides blending into the long top, natural fluffy hair texture

name: Old Money Longo
prompt: long old money haircut: shoulder-length elegant layered hair, pushed back effortlessly, clean refined look, healthy flowing hair texture, rich classic gentlemen aesthetic

name: Corte Social
prompt: standard short men's haircut: uniform 2cm hair length on top, closely scissor-cut sides and back fading softly to the neckline, completely fully covered scalp (NOT skin shaved), neatly combed flat, completely conventional and symmetrical short back and sides, realistic hair density

name: Corte Italiano
prompt: italian haircut style: highly textured wavy hair on top with a casual flow, swept back or slightly messy, soft tapered sides that blend seamlessly, effortless Mediterranean gentleman look, rich volume

name: Short Franja (French Crop)
prompt: short fringe crop haircut: textured messy top, straight blunt short bangs cut high on the forehead, high skin fade on the sides and back, sharp modern clean look

name: Mullet Clássico
prompt: classic mullet haircut: short business-like hair on top and short sides, with distinct long flowing hair trailing down the back past the collar, retro 80s style

name: Barba Italiana
prompt: ADD a classic Italian-style beard: short-to-medium length, full and dense facial hair with a naturally elegant appearance, perfectly connected mustache and beard, slightly rounded contours following the jawline, clean but not overly sharp cheek lines, refined Mediterranean gentleman style, professional barbershop grooming, realistic beard texture and natural hair density

name: Barba Baviera e Bigode Cheio
prompt: ADD a Bavarian style beard with a thick mustache: full long voluminous beard paired with an exceptionally large, dense, prominent handlebar mustache that curves slightly at the ends, rustic alpine explorer aesthetic, rich thick facial hair texture
